subject: 09d Kaggle notebook structure
fact: The saved 09d Kaggle notebook at notebooks/kaggle/09d_vehicle_reid_resnet101ibn/09d_vehicle_reid_resnet101ibn.ipynb is a wrapper notebook: cell 2 embeds the full train_09d.py script inside script_content, and cell 4 runs that script. Future fixes should edit the embedded script via JSON rather than assuming a multi-cell training notebook on disk.
reason: This notebook has both wrapper and expanded-source variants in the repository. Knowing that the pushed 09d notebook is a wrapper prevents editing the wrong file format and losing changes.
